description: Lock warehouse AMR scope to mobile robot fulfillment systems with WMS integration, not generic SCM software or barcode automation.

checks.reason: Broad SCM software is the wrong dependency level for warehouse-floor AMR integration.
Warehouse barcode automation may support operations, but it is not a hard scoped dependency for warehouse AMRs.
Autonomous mobile warehouse robots require mobile navigation and control capability.
WMS integration is an operational deployment and scaling dependency for Kiva-style systems.
